titles.en: Shia exemption from maternal naming on Judgment Day
Shia exemption from maternal naming on Judgment Day

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع إِذَا كَانَ يَوْمُ اَلْقِيَامَةِ دُعِيَ اَلْخَلاَئِقُ بِأُمَّهَاتِهِمْ مَا خَلاَنَا وَ شِيعَتَنَا فَإِنَّا لاَ سِفَاحَ بَيْنَنَا.
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع إِذَا كَانَ يَوْمُ اَلْقِيَامَةِ دُعِيَ اَلْخَلاَئِقُ بِأُمَّهَاتِهِمْ مَا خَلاَنَا وَ شِيعَتَنَا فَإِنَّا لاَ سِفَاحَ بَيْنَنَا.

segments: Ahmed bin Mohammed bin Yahya al-Attar narrated to me from Mohammed bin Yahya bin Sadir that Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: "On the Day of Resurrection, all the creatures will be called with the names of their mothers. We, as well as our Shia, are not bound by this act, because we are saved from adultery."
en.badr-shahin.text: Ahmed bin Mohammed bin Yahya al-Attar narrated to me from Mohammed bin Yahya bin Sadir that Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: "On the Day of Resurrection, all the creatures will be called with the names of their mothers. We, as well as our Shia, are not bound by this act, because we are saved from adultery."

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِي أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى اَلْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَدِيرٍ قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِي أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى اَلْعَطَّارُ
